### About Me

Building the infrastructure for AI agent ecosystems. Creator of **SkillAnything** -- the automated pipeline that turns any software into agent-native Skills.

```yaml
current_focus:
  - SkillAnything: "Auto-generate Skills for any target"
  - platforms: [Claude Code, OpenClaw, OpenAI Codex]
  - philosophy: "If CLI-Anything makes CLIs, SkillAnything makes Skills"

tech_stack:
  languages: [Python, TypeScript]
  ai_platforms: [Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex]
  interests: [Agent Ecosystems, Skill Engineering, Automation]
```
